query:
-- CMD-TEST-001 : Easy Relax (2200) + Mykonos (2300) = 4500€ sans remise
-- Remise 5% = 225€ → discountAmount = 225
-- subtotalHT = 4500 (somme items sans remise) ← DÉJÀ CORRECT
-- totalHT = 4500 - 225 + 250 = 4525 ← DÉJÀ CORRECT
-- totalVAT = 4525 * 20% = 905 ← DÉJÀ CORRECT
-- totalTTC = 4525 + 905 = 5430 ← DÉJÀ CORRECT
-- depositAmount = 5430 * 30% = 1629 ← DÉJÀ CORRECT
-- CMD-TEST-001 est déjà cohérent, on vérifie juste
SELECT orderNumber, subtotalHT, discountAmount, discountPercent, shippingHT, totalHT, totalVAT, totalTTC, depositAmount, balanceAmount
FROM orders WHERE orderNumber = 'CMD-TEST-001';
